executives.name: Dale Klein
executives.background: Professor Emeritus and former Associate Vice Chancellor at the University of Texas System. Former Chairman of the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission.

executives.name: William Post
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Pinnacle West Capital Corporation. He has served on the board since 2010.
